name: regent_starter_plus_gather_refine_glitterstream_wrought_cloak_child_blackhole_shortline
description: 4-turn simulation for Regent A10 starter deck plus GatherLight, RefineBlade, Glitterstream, WroughtInWar, CloakOfStars, ChildOfTheStars, and BlackHole.
assumptions: Starter deck uses the Regent A10 starter definition, including AscendersBane.
Glitterstream is the selected card named flowing radiance/color.
Glitterstream uses parser values from local decompiled source: 11 block now and 5 block next turn.
Power cards use setup priority 99 in simulator play search.
BlackHole and ChildOfTheStars use the current persistent-power simulation support.
Forge uses the simplified SovereignBlade model and credits realized Forge value back to the Forge source card.
